trigger_context: User reports comment system fixes not affecting actual UI - zero console output on interaction

problem_analysis.symptom: Fixed CommentForm and ThreadedCommentSystem components but user still gets no console output when interacting with comment forms
problem_analysis.root_cause: Component discovery anti-pattern - fixing wrong components that aren't actually rendered in live UI

live_ui_component_mapping.comment_implementation: Inline textarea with manual event handlers
live_ui_component_mapping.evidence: RealSocialMediaFeed uses inline comment forms in lines 935-983, not imported components

component_hierarchy_analysis.mismatch: Fixed components exist but are not in the actual render tree

real_social_media_feed_imports: ThreadedCommentSystem (imported but used for different UI)
CommentForm (imported but used for different UI)
Inline forms used for actual user interaction

failure_modes.1_assumption_error: Assumed CommentForm and ThreadedCommentSystem were the UI components users interact with
failure_modes.2_import_vs_usage: Components imported but not used in the critical user interaction paths
failure_modes.3_inline_vs_component: Actual UI uses inline implementations rather than componentized forms
failure_modes.4_testing_isolation: Tests were written against componentized forms that don't match production UI

component_discovery_failure.description: Fixing components that exist in codebase but aren't actually rendered for user interactions
detection_rules: Always trace from App.tsx through actual route components to find live UI
Verify component imports are actually used in render methods
Check for inline implementations vs componentized alternatives
Map user interaction points to actual DOM elements

steps: 1. Identify main route component from App.tsx
2. Trace through component hierarchy to find actual render path
3. Look for inline vs componentized implementations
4. Verify user interaction elements match targeted components

before_fixing: Trace user interaction from App.tsx through actual rendered components
Verify component is actually imported and used in live UI
Check for inline implementations that might override componentized versions
Test in actual browser/dev tools to confirm component is in render tree
validation_rules: If user reports zero console output, component likely not in render path
Always validate fixes in actual browser before claiming success
Check React Dev Tools to confirm component hierarchy matches assumptions

calculation: (0% User Success Rate / 85% Claude Confidence) * 0.3 TDD Factor = 0.23
explanation: Low TDD factor due to reactive debugging approach without systematic test coverage of actual UI components

recommendations.immediate: Fix RealSocialMediaFeed inline comment forms instead of standalone CommentForm components
recommendations.systematic: Build component-to-UI mapping validation before applying fixes
recommendations.long_term: Create integration tests that verify user interaction paths match fixed components
